## Type of change
- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code restructure (no behaviour change)
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — build / tooling / dependencies

## Checklist
- [ ] Code runs without errors in the browser console
- [ ] No duplicate logic introduced
- [ ] Follows project code style (ES6 modules, State Machines, Object Pooling)
- [ ] No game logic written directly inside `update()`
- [ ] Asset files follow the Art Bible pipeline (PNG 2048×2048, black outlines, neon palette)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](../docs/COMMIT_RULES.md)
- [ ] Branch is up-to-date with `develop`
